sourcesContent: import React from 'react'; import { HomeContainer, HomeHeadline, HomeSubhead, HomeContent } from './HomeSectionElements'; const HomeSection = () => { return ( Hello! I'm Nick Turner I like to design software products for humans, make electronic music on synthesizers & cook homemade pizzas. I'm a UX and product design lead based out of Chattanooga, TN. I currently work at Code|Science building enterprise solutions for clients on the Salesforce Platform. I'm an incredibly curious tinkerer with a passion for exploring possibly through mutually beneficial research and collaborative creativity. ) } export default HomeSection
